block_02: With US Independence Day approaching, we would like to highlight important changes to IQ Option’s instrument availability during the holiday.
block_03: Please kindly note that US stock and ETF markets will close early on July 3rd, 2019. In addition, US stocks and ETFs will be closed on July 4th, 2019. Trading on these instruments will be affected.
block_04: Should you have any questions, feel free to get in touch with our Support team, available 24/7 via chat, email or phone.
block_05: We appreciate you choosing our platform and for being part of IQ Option.
